what_was_done: Generated Groth16 proof via SP1 Prover Network (34.7s, 356 bytes). Deployed ThresholdVerifier + WrappedTRS + SP1Verifier to Sepolia. ZK mint 1000 wTRS verified on-chain via SP1VerifierGateway. Full e2e bridge pipeline working.
known_issues: Build requires USE_UPNP=- flag (miniupnpc not installed)
Qt GUI not build-tested (only daemon build verified)
Clore.ai GPU rental SSH broken (4 servers tried, daemon never starts)
Torus-core has no regtest mode (only mainnet/testnet)
next_steps: Relayer service — watch torus-core deposits, generate ZK proofs, submit to Sepolia/BSC
Torus-core testnet node for real deposit testing
Production deployment on BSC mainnet (SP1 gateway at 0x940467b2)
